We will intervene on energy bills if necessary, says MilibandOil and gas prices have surged due to the US-Israel war in Iran, with fears over the cost of living. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj4z7zr4kd8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj4z7zr4kd8o#0 Sun, 15 Mar 2026 11:42:38 GMT
William shares unseen photo of Princess Diana for Mother's DayThe Prince of Wales captioned the previously unseen photo: "remembering my mother, today and every day". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgjz9zx3xl5o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgjz9zx3xl5o#0 Sun, 15 Mar 2026 11:00:27 GMT
Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline rowVolodymyr Zelensky says restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3v7q6d0nq0o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3v7q6d0nq0o#0 Sun, 15 Mar 2026 12:00:35 GMT
UK must build own nuclear missiles to end reliance on US, say Lib DemsSir Ed Davey is calling on the government to start work on a "fully independent British nuclear deterrent". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy0dz1k0rr4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy0dz1k0rr4o#0 Sun, 15 Mar 2026 11:54:12 GMT
